item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
more like, we all don't have Danny Devitos, so we use Christmas trees
unless i develop lactose intolerance or whatever i'm definitely a lifetime cheese consumer
this one messes with me
indeed
i laugh, but at the same time i do care what my dad thinks.. quite a bit
mmm hmm
never regret the saltines.
i hope you do as well
7 bucks went a long ways back then
she must like gabagool
i'll be honest.. i don't want to pet an isopod and i have no idea why they are in so many memes
maybe if i'm on a stimulant for some reason
gotta bone up on your basic french for this one
you might say they're... very.. not good..
this picture gives me anxiety
that's all for now.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Designed and built my new house. Went through a really rough divorce 3 years ago, moved into a little dark apartment. Then the pandemic immediately hit...If this gets any interest I'll post some construction progress and more interior shots.
item.description:
View from the street.
Sunsets in Arkansas are very lovely.
My boy's room nearly finished.
First night with lights on. One of my favorite milestones with new construction.
Living / dining on the way to complete.
Just got mirrors up in my bathroom tonight. (originally posted by @Ericshaun on 2022-12-12 05:23:38)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: 9 dnd memes?
item.description: Hello lovely people. we are looking for friends for a dnd server. We have plenty of DMs working together on multiple stories and a lot of games from one shots, giant encounters to longer campaigns. We have a tavern for RP, memes and art. https://discord.gg/2kQbePC4

item.title: Happy #InternationalMountainDay
item.description: We’ve been making War and Peas for over a decade now. In this era, we’ve created dozens of characters and hundreds of strips. Imgur has grown to an important platform for us and we are so happy to see so many people enjoying our comics. Nevertheless, we rely on the help of the community. If you can afford it, please support us on Patreon so we can continue to publish comics for free: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: The 366th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - D&D MeeMays vol 1
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #DandD #DandDump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: The duel of Sauron and Finrod
item.description:
This is a lore account on a magical contest in the First Age between Finrod Felagund, brother of Galadriel, and the dreadful sorcerer Sauron.
In the annals of Middle-earth perhaps no Elf was as beloved as Finrod Felagund. Wise and compassionate he was praised by Elves, honoured by Dwarves, and a warm friend of Men (art by AlystraeaArt). He was the oldest brother of Galadriel and "of all her kin the nearest to her heart" (Unfinished Tales; II; IV). Yet honour and loyalty would take a toll, and to his sister he would foretell (Silmarillion; III; XV): "An oath I too shall swear, and must be free to fulfil it, and go into darkness."
The people of Finrod and Galadriel was the Noldor, later known as the High Elves. Early in the First Age they settled in the Blessed Realm across the western sea. In its bliss and plenty both their skills and lore grew great, and the Noldor became a mighty people. The king of the Noldor was Finwë, who had three sons and many grandchildren, including Finrod and his siblings (art by Ted Nasmith).
Morgoth, the original Dark Lord, hated the Eldar. Near the end of the First Age Morgoth caused calamity in the Blessed Realm, stole the sacred Silmaril jewels, and slew King Finwë (art by Guillem H. Pongiluppi). Morgoth went to his stronghold in Middle-earth so most of the Noldor left their home to seek revenge, and to make new realms; while Finrod and his siblings also in part departed to visit kinsmen among Middle-earth's Elves.
Finrod's uncle Fëanor claimed kingship over the Noldor, and in order to sail to Middle-earth Fëanor led the vanguard to steal ships in the haven of Alqualondë. Its Elves had little gear of war yet defended their ships and a great part of the "mariners that dwelt in Alqualondë were wickedly slain" (Silmarillion; III; IX). Most of the Noldor, including Finrod, had not participated in the Kinslaying at Alqualondë; yet all who went to Middle-earth would be exiled from the Blessed Realm (art by ivoignob).
The majority nevertheless went on but now saw Fëanor as the cause of their woes. Then the fell lord sailed his loyal followers over the sea and burned the ships to force the rest to return in shame. But those betrayed who had been left behind would not abandon their task; they crossed the grinding ice in the far north to reach Middle-earth, and many were lost on the way. In Middle-earth had Fëanor already fallen in battle, and tensions between the factions were for a time eased (art by Stefan Meisl).
The three royal families spread out and created realms, and Finrod's family held central lands (yellow). The Noldor were hence nominally united under a High King, as some new realms became kingdoms. Finrod first built the fortress of Minas Tirith [not the same place as in the LotR, as this occured four millenia before Gondor existed]. It stood on a river island in a strategically important valley (red square). That vale led north to Morgoth's stronghold that was kept under siege, but after a century Finrod left Minas Tirith to a kinsman and moved south to Nargothrond (dark red square).
Nargothrond was a great underground fortress built with the aid of Dwarves who he greatly rewarded; and they gave him the epithet Felagund ["Hewer of Caves" or "Lord of Caves"]. Finrod Felagund ruled as King of Nargothrond while the northern territories of his family were his vassals. 310 years after the Noldor returned came the first Men to the lands of the High Elves. Finrod met and befriended them, and spoke for them to recieve lands to live in. The first human group was the people of Bëor, that was loyal to Finrod and settled in the northern lands of his House (art by Elena Kukanova).
The fortunes of the Noldor ended 455 years after their return. Morgoth unleashed his hosts of countless Orcs and beasts, headed by Balrogs and the first dragon, and so broke the siege that his stronghold long had been under (art by Jovan Delic). Except for Minas Tirith was the northern territory of Finrod's House defeated and ruined. His brothers were slain and he nearly perished himself, for the King of Nargothrond had hastened north but been cut off from his army and surrounded in a fen with a small company.
Then Barahir, chief of the human people of Bëor, "came up with the bravest of his men and rescued him, and made a wall of spears about him; and they cut their way out of the battle with great loss. Thus Felagund escaped, and returned to his deep fortress of Nargothrond; but he swore an oath of abiding friendship and aid in every need to Barahir and all his kin, and in token of his vow he gave to Barahir his ring" (Silmarillion; III; XVIII onwards, art by Anke Eißmann).
In year 456 Morgoth sent forth his greatest servant and right hand, Sauron, to capture Minas Tirith: "Sauron was become now a sorcerer of dreadful power, master of shadows and of phantoms, foul in wisdom, cruel in strength, misshaping what he touched, twisting what he ruled, lord of werewolves; his dominion was torment." Note: werewolves were wolves posessed by evil spirits (art by CK0T).
Minas Tirith was occupied as Sauron, who used magic horror to drive the defenders away. The isle became accursed and was called Tol-in-Gaurhoth, the Isle of Werewolves, and Sauron guarded the vale from the tower (art by Htogrom). Over the following years the people of Bëor were defeated, and those who did not flee were slain until only Beren, son of Barahir, remained. In year 465 Beren fled and met Lúthien, a fair and brave princess of the Sindar Elves; but Lúthien's father did not approve of a mortal suitor [a trait Jackson gave to Elrond].
In order to marry Lúthien was Beren given the suicidal task of stealing a Silmaril jewel from Morgoth. Though a warrior Beren was desperate and turned to King Finrod for aid. Though the Elf had forseen darkness if he upheld his oath he held his word (art by Anke Eißmann). With ten loyal companions Finrod Felagund joined Beren, and used magic to disguise them as Orcs. So they managed to enter the valley north but the vigilant Sauron in his tower was suspicious. He had their company brought before him [an uninterupted quote over several images follows];
"Thus befell the contest of Sauron and Felagund which is renowned. For Felagund strove with Sauron in songs of power, ad the power of the King was very great; but Sauron had the mastery, as is told in the Lay of Leithian: He chanted a song of wizardry, Of piercing, opening, of treachery, Revealing, uncovering, betraying. Then sudden Felagund there swaying,
Sang in a song of staying, Resisting, battling against power, Of secrets kept, strength like a tower, And trust unbroken, freedom, escape; Of changing and shifting shape, Of snares eluded, broken traps, The prison opening, the chain that snaps.
Backwards and forwards swayed their song. Reeling foundering, as ever more strong The chanting swelled, Felagund fought, And all the magic and might he brought Of Elvenesse into his words. Softly in the gloom they heard the birds Singing afar in Nargothrond, The sighting of the Sea beyond, Beyond the western world, on sand, On sand of pearls on Elvenland.
Then in the doom gathered; darkness growing In Valinor, the red blood flowing Beside the Sea, where the Noldor slew The Foamriders, and stealing drew Their white ships with their white sails From lamplit havens. The wind wails, The wolf howls. The ravens flee. The ice mutters in the mouths of the Sea. The captives sad in Angband mourn. Thunder rumbles, the fires burn- And Finrod fell before the throne.
Then Sauron stripped from the their disguise, and they stood before him naked and afraid. But though their kinds were revealed, Sauron could not discover their names or their purposes. He cast them therefore into a deep pit, dark and silent, and threatened to slay them cruel, unless one would betray the truth to him. From time to time they saw two eyes kindled in the dark, and a werewolf devoured one of the companions; but none betrayed their lord."
When a werewolf came for Beren mustered Finrod all his strength, broke free and wrestled with the werewolf, and slew it with his hands and teeth; but was slain by his wounds (art by Anke Eißmann). Saying farewell he "died then in the dark, in Tol-in-Gaurhoth, whose great tower he himself had built. Thus King Finrod Felagund, fairest and most beloved of the house of Finwë, redeemed his oath; but Beren mourned beside him in despair."
Thanks to the self-sacrifice was Beren soon saved by Luthíen and the hound Huan, Sauron was driven away and Felagund was buried on the cleansed isle; and the two beloved went on to save a Silmaril jewel from Morgoth. Among the tales of sorrow and of ruin that come down from the darkness of those days their tale was the most endorsed by the Elves, for it contained joy and hope (art by Denis Gordeev). As for the Ring of Barahir it remained an heirloom down to Aragorn over seven millenia later; and Aragorn gave it as an engagement ring to Arwen, who was the granddaughter of Galadriel.
Delayed art credits: #15 Ayaosguqin #16 mariaeldin #17 KuliszuArt #18 Dartxo — — — — — For more of my Tolkien lore posts, enjoy these two indexes: Character bios https://imgur.com/gallery/axV2mPF Folks, animals, items, etc https://imgur.com/gallery/AQK9pJL
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: “Coward” is trending on social media, here’s why…￼
item.description:
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g7vBid7_J8s
Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early.
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: Consider this alternative:
item.description: We've done this the last five or six years. With just four of us, a roast of any sort is too much, leaves gravy and mash and other stuff in the fridge for days. Some homemade appetizers (sausage cheese balls, veg tray) and a half-dozen frozen ones from the grocery store. A few minutes to set up and bake. More time for The Good Stuff. Going to make a plate of this stuff for an old gal who has to work at the convenience store where I get morning coffee. She's mostly alone except for a couple of cats, and she has to work in two weeks when the store opens at 10am. Be excellent to one another, especially in this season.
item.dc:creator: prfesser

item.title: Where we sleep is kinda a creepy thing to promote...
item.description: This is from my old place, the project was nearly done, all there was left to do was paint. I'd take a new video, but don't live there anymore. Oh, and my dogs name is Sweet Boy, figured you'd ask. #bedroom

item.title: Excuse me while I go sob in the corner ...
item.description: I'm so sorry. So sorry that children must be subjected to the horrific emotional abuse of a society normalizing mass murder. So sorry that bulletproof backpacks are a thing for kids. So sorry that mom's kiss their babies good-bye every morning with this torture in their hearts. MV edit: I do not want this post to go viral. I don't want this post to exist. In a perfect world, I would be telling the story as a science fiction writer and you would be coming back to me saying "that's absurd, this kind of thing would only exist in a dystopian society and we would never let this happen."
item.dc:creator: inkican
